channel.title: Bloomberg Green Global
channel.description: Últimos artigos de Bloomberg Green Global

item.title: EU Clears Final Hurdle for Cultivation of Gene-Edited Crops
item.description: European Union lawmakers voted in favor of a framework for gene-edited plants in the bloc, clearing the final hurdle for legislation to enable the cultivation of hardier crops.
item.dc:creator: Max Ramsay, Agnieszka de Sousa

item.title: Geothermal Startup Bets Modular Plants Can Power AI Boom
item.description: Critical Energy plans to manufacture geothermal plants on an assembly line, cutting deployment timelines to weeks.
item.dc:creator: Summer Maxwell

item.title: Botswana Eyes Power Exports With $100-Million Solar Plant
item.description: Botswana is set to begin construction of its first large-scale solar plant after developers secured $100 million in financing, as investors bet that rising electricity demand across southern Africa will create a lucrative market for surplus power.
item.dc:creator: Adelaide Changole

item.title: Chicago, Midwest Brace for Thunderstorms While Floods Hit Texas
item.description: As the US Gulf coast braces for flooding, there’s a moderate level 4 risk of severe thunderstorms across central Illinois and Indiana.
item.dc:creator: Brian K Sullivan

item.title: Anthropic Backs $915 Million Fund for Carbon Removal Projects
item.description: The collective, known as Frontier, pools money to buy carbon removal from startups developing durable climate solutions.
item.dc:creator: Michelle Ma

item.title: Dry June Forces Mumbai to Shut Taps for Construction Sites
item.description: Mumbai has suspended water supply to construction sites as a stalled monsoon and the worst June rain deficit in two decades risk slowing business activity in India’s financial hub.
item.dc:creator: Azman Usmani

item.title: Green Economy Tops $10 Trillion as Revenue Growth Picks Up
item.description: The green economy — the business lines of global listed companies that generate revenue from climate solutions — now boasts a record high market value of $10 trillion.
item.dc:creator: Alastair Marsh

item.title: Adani Green Seeks $1 Billion Offshore Loan After US Settlement
item.description: Adani Green Energy Ltd. is seeking to raise as much as $1 billion through an offshore loan, according to people familiar with the matter, its first overseas borrowing since emerging from legal troubles in the US.
item.dc:creator: Saikat Das

item.title: China’s Energy Transition Now Hinges on Greening Industry: Agora
item.description: China has reached the point where its climate goals now depend on cutting carbon emissions in some of its dirtiest industries.
item.dc:creator: Ocean Hou

item.title: Texas Braces for More Rain, Floods as Gulf Storm Strengthens
item.description: Tropical storm and flood warnings are in effect along the Texas and Louisiana coastlines as a weather system strengthens and threatens to bring torrential downpours.
item.dc:creator: Brian K Sullivan
